skillName: Generate geometric sequences using term to term rules
misconceptionSummary: Students know the multiplier but do not apply it consistently across multiple generated terms.

lines.text: Start at 4, multiply by 3 each time

steps.narration: Use the starting value and multiplier to generate the sequence.

visuals.expression: Start value + repeated multiplier generates the sequence
visuals.label: Use the same multiplier at every step

steps.narration: To generate a geometric sequence, repeat the multiplication rule from term to term.

misconceptionStrip.text: Common mistake: multiplying once correctly and then changing rule. Check every new term against the same multiplier.
misconceptionStrip.audioNarration: A geometric generation rule must be repeated exactly at every step.
